film.title: Kabir Singh
film.overview: Kabir, a genius yet hostile medical student, falls in love with Preeti from his college. When Preeti's father spots the couple kissing, he opposes their relationship and decides to marry her off.

dialogues.dialogue: -Please hear him out. -Shut up! How dare you bring him home? Shameless girl! Don't you care about our reputation? Listen to me carefully.
dialogues.cause_raw: bringing a boy home without permission

dialogues.dialogue: And yes, you read that right. We have done it more than 100 times. Aren't you ashamed of yourself? Your love drives me crazy Your love drives me crazy...Shankar.
Did you go to meet that girl again? She is married now, Kabir. -You should be ashamed of yourself. -Mom! -Let's go inside. -Guess what? All the guests at the wedding were asking about you.
I let you stay here because I thought you were a good doctor. Look at what you've done! You should be ashamed of yourself. What kind of a doctor-- It belongs to a friend. You can stay here tonight.
Why are you here, Kabir? You should leave. I won't leave. You should be ashamed of yourself, Kabir. Stay away from me. Really? How do you know that I am not happy?
dialogues.cause_raw: Intruding personal space or unwanted presence

dialogues.dialogue: But now that I am away from you Why should I stay away from you? I am your pride Let's fill this void right now You were my dream come true
She loved me. What did her father say? My pride! My reputation! That's utter b******t. If Preeti and I were together, we would have had a family.

That's utter b******t. If Preeti and I were together, we would have had a family. But because of the my pride factor, we got divided and that baby will never see the face of this earth. I am sure he knows about us.
Look at Dad, Karan. Kabir, just shut up. I am proud of one thing in my life. My career is the only thing that I am proud of. Oh, God!
Kabir, just shut up. I am proud of one thing in my life. My career is the only thing that I am proud of. Oh, God! Kabir, we'll talk about this later.

Did you consume alcohol or some other chemical intoxicants? And, the day before that. But I never caused discomfort to any of my patients and I am proud of that. The hospital management and the staff have nothing to do with it. Your medical license will be seized for five years.
